scripts.build:moon: moon build --target wasm-gc && moon build --target js
scripts.build:packages: npm run build:moon && npm run sync:release
scripts.build:examples: npm --prefix packages/examples/moon-lottie-core run build && npm --prefix packages/examples/moon-lottie-react run build
scripts.build:deploy: npm run build:packages && npm run build:site && npm run build:examples && node scripts/build-deploy-bundle.js
